name: Peach Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Half & Half or Coffee Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the peaches and cut them in half, removing the stone. Arrange the halves with the cut side down in an unbaked pie shell.
2. Mix sugar, flour, and cinnamon with cream to make a paste. Pour over the peaches.
3. Place in a preheated oven set to 450 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for 10 minutes or until the shell begins to brown.
4. Reduce heat to moderate (350 degrees Fahrenheit) and continue baking for an additional 30 minutes, or until the peaches are tender.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving cold.
